name: bonfolit
description: Bonfolit marketplace — standards, recipes, and guardrails for Unity mobile-game projects.

metadata.description: Standards, recipes, and guardrails for Bonfolit Unity mobile-game projects. Single source of truth — install instead of copying docs into each game.

plugins.name: bonfolit-standards
plugins.description: Architecture standards, everyday recipes (add feature/popup/endpoint), a standards auditor, and rule-enforcement hooks for Bonfolit Unity games. The single source of truth — install it instead of copying docs into each game.
